metadata.description: Claude Code skills for working with Odoo, split into three tiers so installs are isolated by capability. read = inspect-only, write = production mutations, demo = sandboxed mutations tagged for cleanup. Skills are produced by an RL pipeline that distills successful agent trajectories on real Odoo tasks.

plugins.name: odoo-skills-read
plugins.description: READ-ONLY Odoo skills. Inspect models, query records, audit data, run health checks. Cannot mutate state. Safe to install on production. No write tools loaded — installing this plugin alone gives the agent NO ability to change anything.

plugins.name: odoo-skills-write
plugins.description: WRITE-CAPABLE Odoo skills. Set field defaults, create custom fields, modify window actions, build automated actions. Mutates production data on the connected Odoo instance. ONLY install on databases where you want the agent to make real changes. Includes its own confirmation rules but the operator should treat this plugin as production-grade tooling.

plugins.name: odoo-skills-demo
plugins.description: DEMO/SANDBOX Odoo skills. Same capabilities as the write tier, but every artifact is tagged with [DEMO] / x_demo_ / .demo. so it can be discovered and removed. Use on demo or sandbox Odoo instances for prototyping, learning, and walkthroughs. Includes a cleanup recipe.
